subcodes.first_line: O Lord, aid through the holy confirmations of Thy divine mercy all who have turned unto the Dayspring of Thy oneness, and open before them the gates [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب اید کل من توجه الی مطلع وحدانیتک بتاییدات قدس رحمانیتک و افتح علیه ابواب
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
